tuning: E A D G B E
content:
MACY GRAY - I TRY


[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
Games, changes and fears. When will they go from here[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
When will they stop. I believe that fate has brought us here[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
And we should be together babe. But we're not[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
I play it off but I'm dreaming of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
I'll keep my cool but I'm feelin[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
I try to say goodbye and I choke[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
Try to walk away but I stumble[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Though I try to hide it, it's clear[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
My world crumbles when you are not near[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
Goodbye and I choke[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
Try to walk away and I stumble[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Though I try to hide it, it's clear[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
My world crumbles when you are not near[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]     
I may appear to be free. But I'm just a prisoner of your love[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]    
I may seem alright and smile when you leave. [/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
But my smiles are just a front, just a front[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
I play it off but I'm dreaming of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
I'll keep my cool but I'm feelin[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
I try to say goodbye and I choke[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
Try to walk away but I stumble[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Though I try to hide it, it's clear[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
My world crumbles when you are not near[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
Goodbye and I choke[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
Try to walk away and I stumble[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Though I try to hide it, it's clear[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
My world crumbles when you are not near[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Here is my confession. May I be your possession?[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]C7[/ch]
Boy I need your touch. Your love kisses and such[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]  
With all my might I try. But this I can't deny [/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
I play it off but I'm dreaming of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]         
I'll keep my cool but I'm feelin [/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]
